_readme: Merge the 'autoApprove' array below into your project's .gemini/settings.json. DO NOT overwrite existing entries — only add what is missing. Create .gemini/settings.json if it does not exist.
_format_note: Gemini CLI prefix matching: wildcard (*) is only supported at the END of a pattern. Middle wildcards are treated as literals and will never match. Keep patterns as simple prefixes with a trailing * where needed.
